---
title: "Bingyan Li"
subtitle: "Ph.D. Student"
image: bingyan_li.jpg
date: 2026-03-01
image-alt: "Bingyan Li"
categories:
  - Ph.D.
  - 2026
  - He/Him
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  id: hero-heading
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {#hero-heading}

&nbsp;
<div class="h1">李秉彦</div>

**博士生研究员**  

&nbsp;

[College of Biomedical Engineering](https://bme-college.fudan.edu.cn/)  
Fudan University

&nbsp;

**Lab Period**  
Mar 2026 - Present

📧 **Email** 213221829(at)seu.edu.cn

:::

## About

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6 #about-me-1}

Bingyan Li is a doctor student working on counterfactual image generation.

:::

::: {.g-col-6 #about-me-2}

Bingyan joined the lab in 2026 and is currently pursuing his doctoral degree in Biomedical Engineering at Fudan University.

<ul class="fa-ul">
   <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i></span>M.S. ∙ Fudan University ∙ Expected 2031</li>
   <li><span class="fa-li"><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i></span>B.S. ∙ Southeast University ∙ 2026</li>
</ul>

:::
:::
